title: Parent Phase B5 — Directory & Teams Reads
execution_plan_ref: docs/platform/EXECUTION_PLAN.md - M365 CPS Track B P5

principles: Tool-first determinism (capability surface must equal advertised surface)
Operator observability (the system must explain its own state)
Plan-first execution with strict per-phase gates
anti_alignment: Mutation fence on actual write actions stays on
Risk-tier classification per agent stays unchanged
Two-phase confirmation gate for high-risk mutations stays on

user_stated_requirements: Add directory.domains, directory.roles, teams.get, channels.list, channels.get.
intent_capture.intent_verification: Tasks T1..T12 together satisfy this parent phase's objective.

objective: Add directory.domains, directory.roles, teams.get, channels.list, channels.get.
current_state: Parent phase scope draft; no implementation yet.
target_state: All child tasks complete; GATE green; commit + push to feat/m365-cps-trkB.

file_denylist: Any file not in allowlist of the active child-phase task

requirements.description: Carry-through of master R4; this parent phase contributes scoped behavior.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Per-task exit criteria; parent GATE passes.

requirements.description: Carry-through of master R8; this parent phase contributes scoped behavior.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Per-task exit criteria; parent GATE passes.

tasks.name: Read context for parent phase
tasks.description: Read existing m365_runtime/graph/registry.py, ucp_m365_pack/client.py alias table, registry/action_registry.yaml. Document existing patterns to match.

tasks.name: Add graph.directory.domains registry entry
tasks.description: Add ActionSpec for graph.directory.domains (workload directory; auth_modes ['app_only_secret', 'app_only_certificate', 'auth_code_pkce']; scopes ['Domain.Read.All']; risk low; rw read) to READ_ONLY_REGISTRY in src/m365_runtime/graph/registry.py. Endpoint per parent plan B-action spec table.
exit_criteria: get_action('graph.directory.domains') returns the spec; admit() works
tasks.validation_command: cd $M365_ROOT && .venv/bin/python -c "from m365_runtime.graph.registry import get_action; spec = get_action('graph.directory.domains'); assert spec.workload == 'directory'; print('OK')"

tasks.name: Add graph.directory.roles registry entry
tasks.description: Add ActionSpec for graph.directory.roles (workload directory; auth_modes ['app_only_secret', 'app_only_certificate', 'auth_code_pkce']; scopes ['RoleManagement.Read.Directory']; risk low; rw read) to READ_ONLY_REGISTRY in src/m365_runtime/graph/registry.py. Endpoint per parent plan B-action spec table.
exit_criteria: get_action('graph.directory.roles') returns the spec; admit() works
tasks.validation_command: cd $M365_ROOT && .venv/bin/python -c "from m365_runtime.graph.registry import get_action; spec = get_action('graph.directory.roles'); assert spec.workload == 'directory'; print('OK')"

tasks.description: Add ActionSpec for graph.teams.get (workload teams; auth_modes ['auth_code_pkce', 'app_only_secret', 'app_only_certificate']; scopes ['Team.ReadBasic.All']; risk low; rw read) to READ_ONLY_REGISTRY in src/m365_runtime/graph/registry.py. exit_criteria: get_action('graph.teams.get') returns the spec; admit() works
tasks.validation_command: cd $M365_ROOT && .venv/bin/python -c "from m365_runtime.graph.registry import get_action; spec = get_action('graph.teams.get'); assert spec.workload == 'teams'; print('OK')"

tasks.name: Add graph.channels.get registry entry
tasks.description: Add ActionSpec for graph.channels.get (workload teams; auth_modes ['auth_code_pkce', 'app_only_secret', 'app_only_certificate']; scopes ['Channel.ReadBasic.All']; risk low; rw read) to READ_ONLY_REGISTRY in src/m365_runtime/graph/registry.py. exit_criteria: get_action('graph.channels.get') returns the spec; admit() works

tasks.name: Update legacy alias table
tasks.description: Update LEGACY_ACTION_TO_RUNTIME_ACTION in ucp_m365_pack/client.py with legacy_name -> graph.X.Y mappings for the new actions.
exit_criteria: map_legacy_action_to_runtime() returns expected runtime action_id for each legacy name
tasks.validation_command: cd $M365_ROOT && .venv/bin/python -c "from ucp_m365_pack.client import map_legacy_action_to_runtime, LEGACY_ACTION_TO_RUNTIME_ACTION; assert len(LEGACY_ACTION_TO_RUNTIME_ACTION) > 22"

tasks.name: Update YAML registry mirror
tasks.description: Update registry/action_registry.yaml with corresponding stanzas for the new graph.* actions.

tasks.name: M365 unit tests
tasks.description: Add per-action unit tests in tests/test_m365_pack_client.py covering: registry lookup, admit() success, admit() denial when missing scope.

tasks.name: UCP routing unit tests
tasks.description: Add UCP-side test_m365_integration entries that exercise execute_m365_action with the new actions through the alias table.

tasks.name: Pre-commit + make test
deliverables: pre-commit + make test green in both repos
tasks.validation_command: cd $M365_ROOT && pre-commit run --all-files && make test && cd $UCP_ROOT && pre-commit run --all-files && make test

tasks.name: Commit (no push)
tasks.validation_command: cd $UCP_ROOT && git log --oneline -1 | grep 'plan:m365-cps-trkB-p5' && cd $M365_ROOT && git log --oneline -1 | grep 'plan:m365-cps-trkB-p5'

checks.name: Parent phase B5 integration
checks.description: All child tasks T1..T12 green; integration test pass

no_go_triggers: Any child task fails its validation_command

agent_constraints: Do not touch files outside Section 5 file allowlist.
Do not skip or reorder tasks (Section 7 strict ordering).
Do not modify thresholds or invariants to make gates green without owner approval.
Do not execute until plan status is approved.
Reference plan:{plan-id}:{task-id} in all action log entries and commits.
Do not add tasks, gates, or deliverables not in this plan without owner approval.
Call validate_action MCP tool before any write operation (UCP server).
Each child phase commits locally; no push until parent-phase GATE is green.
Each parent-phase GATE pushes to feat/m365-cps-trk{X} branch only.
Each track GATE merges to development (UCP) and main (M365) only after live tenant smoke green.
